plan.failureSummary: The deterministic automation failed because it attempted to interact with a 'Last Name' field that is no longer present on the page, according to the failure screenshot.
observedIndicators: Failure screenshot shows 'Your Name' field whereas the failed tool call was looking for 'Last Name' or 'input-lastname'
Test is running in DETERMINISTIC mode using potentially stale cached instructions
The application URL contains 'unstable-survey', suggesting intentional UI variability
Historical data shows a pattern of intermittent failures followed by successes, typical of cache-refresh cycles on dynamic UIs

remediationSteps.summary: Clear the page.ai cache and retry.温
remediationSteps.details: Execute the test again with the 'clearPageAiCache' directive enabled to force the agent to re-scan the page and generate a new plan.

remediationSteps.summary: Evaluate if deterministic mode is appropriate for this unstable environment.
remediationSteps.details: If the survey form fields are known to be highly dynamic, consider disabling deterministic mode for this specific test or using a more flexible selector strategy.

plan.notes: The failure screenshot shows a 'Your Name' field where the cached automation plan expected a 'Last Name' field. This mismatch indicates a UI change that has rendered the current cache stale. Given the 'unstable-survey' name of the app, structural changes are likely frequent. Clearing the cache will allow the autonomous agent to adapt to the new form layout.
